notes: Scotland are without pre-tournament absentee Billy Gilmour (knee), with Kieran Tierney back in training after a scare vs Morocco and Aaron Hickey remaining a doubt; Lawrence Shankland is expected to start from the bench per Clarke's defensive setup. Brazil are without the injured Raphinha (hamstring, confirmed out), plus pre-tournament absences Rodrygo (ACL), Estêvão and Militão; Neymar is available after missing the first two games but Ancelotti has been coy on whether he starts.
home_scorers: John McGinn (only scorer so far this tournament, set-piece threat)
Che Adams (starting striker, physical pressing outlet)
Scott McTominay (box-to-box runner, late arriving goalscorer)
away_scorers: Matheus Cunha (starting striker, brace vs Haiti, in-form finisher)
Vinícius Júnior (leading attacking threat, dribbler and finisher)
Neymar (returning superstar, on penalties if selected)
